subtitle: The Shattered Continent — sole survivable landmass after the Rapture
ocean: Fracture Ocean (impassable mana storms; no intercontinental travel)

mapInset.comment: Cartography bounds within world-map.png (excludes title, legend, compass frame)

nodes.name: Forgotten Palace
nodes.description: White palace in mist — memories traded for depth.

nodes.name: Archive Spires
nodes.description: Aetherian capital spires — largest pre-Rapture library still standing.

nodes.name: Limbo
nodes.description: Dimensional pocket between cycles — islands, broken stars, distorted time.

nodes.name: Eternal Machine
nodes.description: Bronze towers and clockwork law — the Clockwork Empress's domain.

nodes.name: Celestial Peaks
nodes.description: Obsidian summits where the Dragon Conclave watches the age turn.

nodes.name: Fracture Scar
nodes.description: A belt of silver lightning and unstable mana where reality thins.
nodes.significance: Rift storm danger zone crossing the northern interior.

nodes.name: World Tree
nodes.description: Colossal tree through the clouds — biomes stacked on every branch.

nodes.name: Black Stone
nodes.description: Viktor Drake's iron capital — order, conscription, industrial salvation.

nodes.name: City of Shadows
nodes.description: Twilight ruins where regret takes shape — a sovereign-less dungeon city.

nodes.name: Stonebridge
nodes.description: A fortified bridge-town taxing trade along the central river.
nodes.significance: Minor trade hub between west ruins and eastern valleys.

nodes.name: Riverbend Hold
nodes.description: Walled farming commune on a bend of the Valdris River — militia, granaries, bells.
nodes.significance: Minor safe settlement; Sanctuary trade partner.

nodes.name: Ashwolf Forest
nodes.description: First named monster territory — ash-grey wolves and grave-walkers between the trees.
nodes.significance: High danger wilds; early delver proving ground.

nodes.name: Mana Convergence
nodes.description: Where ley-lines cross beneath Valdris — dungeons and awakenings spike nearby.
nodes.significance: World network node; sovereign territories anchor here.

nodes.name: Sanctuary
nodes.description: White stone walls, Founder's Tree, healers — humanity's enduring hope.
nodes.significance: Founded by Cassian Reed and Adrian Hale.

nodes.name: Sanctuary Valley
nodes.description: Fertile defensible valley chosen for humanity's beacon.

nodes.name: Crimson Wastes
nodes.description: Organic hive tunnels breach the surface — evolution never sleeps.

nodes.name: Crimson Hive
nodes.description: Living dungeon of chitin corridors and royal gel.

nodes.name: Ironhorn Plains
nodes.description: Stampeding territorial beasts across open grassland.

nodes.name: Millhaven
nodes.description: Windmills and terraced fields under Sanctuary's protection charter.

nodes.name: Old Crossing
nodes.description: Refugee tents where Ashford evacuees first regrouped along the coastal road.

nodes.name: Highway Camp
nodes.description: Abandoned interstate turned survivor corridor — cookfires, watchtowers, fragile trust.
nodes.significance: Where strangers become family before Sanctuary rises.

nodes.name: New Hope
nodes.description: A failed settlement attempt — walls half-built, gardens reclaimed by mana-touched weeds.
nodes.significance: Cautionary minor community on the road east.

nodes.name: Ashford
nodes.description: Cassian's fallen metropolis — ground zero where the sky first tore.
nodes.significance: Fractured City; Day Zero broadcast origin.

nodes.name: Ashford Undercity
nodes.description: Preserved subterranean streets — amber lights, sealed doors, the First Dungeon.
nodes.significance: Discovery of dungeon law and rune archives.

nodes.name: Ashford Harbor
nodes.description: Black water under a silver wound — the harbor fracture seen live worldwide.

nodes.name: Abyssal Gate
nodes.description: Coastal rift descending into starless depths — maps lie here.
